feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Possibility to change status of purchasing documents
entry.content:
As far as I know it is not possible to change the statuses of the purchasing documents (ex. purchase requisition). In the current flow of the customer the purchase requisition starts in the application "my purchase requisitions" (F1639A). When a requestor creates a purchase requisition it goes in to the status "approved", which is not in line with the flow. After the requestor has created this purchase requisition, another person with more authorizations should enhance the purchase requisition. 

Still the status of the requisition of the first person is "approved", while it should be something like "submitted". Is there any possibility to change the status names in the system accordingly?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4 Public Cloud x MBC Setup
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm currently trying to connect an S4 Public Cloud system to MBC. Right now, I'm in the process of configuring the MBC settings directly in S4. The configuration guide and documentation keep referring to an MBC connector. Can you tell me where this connector is located? Directly in S4 or in the MBC tenant? It’s a bit confusing because I thought I had to make the settings in S4, but there are constant references to an MBC connector whose settings are supposed to override the configuration in S4 and make it optional.

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Intermittent Non-Delivery of Emails from “Schedule Billing Output” (F1510)
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

When we attempt to send billing documents directly to customers via a job created in the “Schedule Billing Output” app (F1510), we have noticed that even when the document shows the status “Sent” in the system, customers sometimes do not receive the emails. Is there anything that could be blocking these messages?

Additionally, does the system validate whether the email addresses are valid?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Creating Production Order Component Line Items via API
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We are currently working on a Custom Application Developed using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) model in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are being managed.

As part of our requirement, we are using the A_ProductionOrderComponent_4 API to update values in the CO02 Production Order screen. However, this API does not fully meet our needs.

At present, when using the PATCH method, we are only able to modify existing line items and are unable to create new ones.

Our requirement is to create new line items in the Production Order Component along with the corresponding batch details. We would like to understand if there is any POST method or appropriate API available to support this functionality. Alternatively, we would appreciate any recommendations for a suitable approach to achieve this requirement.

Thank you,

Production order Component line Item

entry.title: Project Budget not flexible to add budget-based schedules in Exisiting Project
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Project Budget not flexible to add budget-based schedules in Exisiting Project

In S/4HANA Public Cloud release, there is any supported way to “add new WBS elements to an existing enterprise project using the standard Excel templates (Import Financial Plan Data / Project Budget, etc.) 

In S/4HANA Public Cloud release, there is any supported way to “add new WBS elements to an existing enterprise project using the standard Excel templates (Import Financial Plan Data / Project Budget, etc.) 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API for : Manage Budget Documents - Project app
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Our client would like to automate updation of Project Budgets data via an API.

We can see a Fiori app "Manage Budget Documents - Project " which can be used but client would like to mimic its functionality via an API(interface). Do we have an API in S4 Public cloud for this requirement?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: requirement dates in capacity scheduling table
entry.content:
We are working with EDI scheduling agreements in SAP  S/4HANA  Public Cloud and noticed the following behavior:

In the Capacity Scheduling Table app, the requirement date always shows a time of 00:00, even though a different time is maintained in the scheduling agreement release (delivery schedule).

Is there any way to influence or adjust this time, or is it always fixed to 00:00 because planning in S/4HANA Public Cloud is performed only on a daily basis (date‑level planning)?

entry.title: Transport Calendar
entry.content: I'm not able to transport Factory Calendar for further systems. How can I do it?

entry.title: Delivery partner details from CDS not released for development
entry.content:
The CDS views to fetch the delivery partner details such as I_DeliveryDocumentPartner, I_DeliveryPartnerAddress, I_OutboundDeliveryPartnerTP are not released to use for development.

Please provide any accessible CDS views for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set up OUTPUT parameters for PO to send Email only to Goods Supplier(WS) & not to Vendor (LF)
entry.content:
we are trying to send Purchase order to as Email only to Goods Supplier(WS) & not to Vendor (LF) 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Batch Determination Enhancement with Shelf-Life Freshness Control (≥75%)
entry.content:
Hello,

One Requirement related to Batch Determination but freshness control 75 come from customer 

Requirement -

 

The proposed solution in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud will introduce freshness-based batch control at the Sales Order level for Domestic customers. For MT, E-commerce, and CSD channels, batch determination will be mandatory and restricted to only those batches that meet a configurable minimum freshness threshold (default ≥75%), calculated based on the remaining shelf life derived from the batch expiration date and sales order date. This freshness percentage will be maintained at an administrative level for flexibility. The customer channel will be identified via a field in the Business Partner master, which will drive the applicability of this logic. For other channels such as GT, FS, and B2B, standard FIFO-based batch selection will continue without freshness restriction. This solution will apply only to domestic transactions, while export orders and branch transfers remain out of scope.

How can we configure this in SAP S/4 hana Public Cloud

entry.title: Capacity responsible planner group in work center
entry.content: I know that it is currently not possible to configure new capacity responsible in capacity header for work center but in our case no standard entry exists in table and hence we are unable to create any work center. The capacity category is mandatory and once it is entered system directly navigates to header where capacity responsible in mandatory. I was able to do it on customizing tenant but on Test tenant there seems to be no entry available in Table TC27. Attaching screenshot for reference:

entry.title: Credit Exposure Mismatch
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have activated credit management in production and were cross checking the Exposure vs Open Receivable value. Here we have identified multiple customers with mismatch. Sharing one sample herewith, request you to review and guide on the resolution.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Warning Message in Financial Statement Versions App
entry.content:
Hello,

When accessing the Financial Statement Versions app, the following warning message appeared:

 

Warning  “This app is outdated and is going to be removed in an upcoming release. Please switch to the successor configuration activity, Define Financial Statement Versions, in Global Hierarchies.”

 

We would like to know when this app is scheduled to be removed, and by when we need to complete the transition. 

Thank you for your time and assistance.

entry.title: API連携で契約マスタが有効化できない
entry.content:
SAPのAPIを使用して契約マスタの登録を行いたいのですが、
登録された契約マスタが無効化となってしまいます。
API連携で有効化するにはどうしたら良いか確認させて下さい。

API連携で使用している項目は添付資料を参照ください。

entry.title: he supplier down payment app is currently not visible in the system
entry.content:
Hi, We have requirement to post down payment. We dont see any app (except - Monitor Purchase Order Down Payments) to post down payment without purchase order ( we dont have SD and MM module). Could you please help to fix it. Do we need to activate any scope item to make down payment app visible ?

user id - CB9980000011 

Regards,

Paresh

entry.title: NO Foreign trade reporting in the public cloud (like Z4, Z5, Z10)
entry.content:
In the Public Cloud, foreign trade reporting is no longer supported, and we now have to go through the cumbersome process of reactivating the old LZB indicator and defining it for each process in order to continue evaluating the required reports. We do not have FI-CA active. So far, we have not found any way to generate these reports automatically.

Since the LZB field is not mandatory, we will now change this and enforce it through a validation rule so that it becomes mandatory whenever a process needs to be reported. However, this workaround is not ideal, and from the Public Cloud I was really expecting more automation in this area.

Are we missing something?

entry.title: Multiple Purchase Organization for one plant
entry.content:
We need to operate two separate purchasing organizations for a single plant to achieve a clear organizational separation of purchasing processes within the system. 
Is it technically possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to assign more than one purchasing organization to a single plant? If yes, what is the correct configuration in CBC? If no, what is the recommended approach to achieve the required organizational separation?

entry.title: Need to develop batch program to transfer stock using movement type 311 relevant to WM
entry.content:
Hi ,

I need to develop a batch program to transfer stock from one storage location and storage bin to another storage location and storage bin in WM/EWM.

As part of my analysis, I first tried using I_MaterialDocumentTP, but I am unable to proceed because the storage bin field is not available there for posting.

I also explored the API /SCWM/IF_API_WHSE_TASK, but it appears to be restricted for use in the Public Cloud environment.

From my understanding, this stock transfer requirement might potentially be handled in one of the following ways:

  • By posting a stock transfer using movement type 311 along with Plant, Storage Location, Storage Bin, Batch, and Product details.

  • By changing the storage type using the Storage Attributes app.

Could you please suggest the appropriate solution for achieving this stock transfer in Public Cloud?

Thanks & Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Receipt Management - Irritants to follow the receipts to do
entry.content:
Hello, thank you by advance for your help.

Since we deployed in SAP for purchases, we have a problem regarding receipts. The major problem is for the moment we haven't found a way to clearly identify for the users the reception he has to do on the month, on the year, and on all the purchase orders he has. And the problem regarding this is as no receipt is put on the purchase order, it is impossible to put an invoice on the purchase order, and so sometimes we are late to pay a supplier.

Can you give me some ideas on the topic? Are there views/apps that allow us to follow easily the receipts on a specific user or on a specific month? Have you found this problems with other clients before and do you know if there are some solutions?

We're very open to new ideas because for the moment we don't know how to manage it and it is a very big irritant for our users and also for our purchasing team that is completing the invoices.

Thanks a lot for your reply and have a good day.

Romane QUAGLIARINI.
